overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle travels from surface streets onto an elevated highway, through tunnels, and back into dense urban corridors with heavy neon signage and pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: beginning drive on wet city streets with heavy neon signage

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked city streets following a white van ahead

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertisements on building facades
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
tall urban structures with glass and concrete facades

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, surrounded by towering neon billboards and commercial buildings. The vehicle follows a white van ahead on the wet multi-lane road, with crosswalks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp with concrete barriers

events.description: turning onto elevated highway ramp from surface street

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the elevated highway ramp

entered.detail: tall concrete safety barriers lining both sides of the elevated road
metal fencing overhead and along the sides of the elevated structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the surface streets onto an elevated highway ramp, leaving the dense neon signage behind. Concrete barriers and chain-link fencing line the sides of the ramp as the vehicle ascends, with the city lights visible in the distance through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway tunnel with directional lighting

events.description: entering tunnel, switching from neon city light to artificial tunnel lighting
approaching tunnel exit, neon city lights becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through the enclosed tunnel section with artificial lighting

entered.detail: rows of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior
smooth concrete walls enclosing the tunnel passage

segments.scene_description: Driving through an enclosed highway tunnel with artificial ceiling lighting, sheltered from the rain. The concrete walls create a narrow corridor effect until the vehicle approaches the tunnel exit around 30 seconds, where the neon glow of the city becomes visible again.

events.description: exiting tunnel back onto surface streets with pedestrian activity
navigating through intersection with pedestrians crossing

agents.ego_description: navigating city intersections with active pedestrian crossings and commercial activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrians waiting at crosswalk and crossing the street

entered.detail: ground-level shops with bright neon signage and awnings
small vendor stalls or kiosks on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a busy commercial intersection with neon storefronts and active pedestrian crosswalks. The vehicle navigates through the intersection where pedestrians are crossing, with street vendors visible on the sidewalks and bright signage illuminating the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street under highway overpasses

events.description: entering covered street section beneath highway overpasses

agents.ego_description: driving through covered urban corridors beneath overpasses with neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk under the overpass

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail tracks running overhead creating a covered canopy
thick concrete columns supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered urban canyon beneath highway overpasses, sheltered from the rain. Thick concrete support pillars line the street while neon advertisements continue to illuminate the corridor. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks in this semi-enclosed environment beneath the elevated infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from surface streets to elevated infrastructure and back into dense urban corridors. It begins by following a white van along a wet multi-lane road flanked by towering neon billboards, before ascending an elevated highway ramp lined with concrete barriers and chain-link fencing. The camera then enters an enclosed highway tunnel where artificial ceiling lights replace the rain and neon, creating a narrow concrete corridor that eventually opens back into the city's glow. Upon emerging from the tunnel, the vehicle navigates a busy commercial intersection filled with active pedestrian crosswalks and bright storefronts. The scene finally shifts into a covered urban canyon beneath massive highway overpasses, where thick concrete support pillars and neon advertisements frame the street.
